diff -urN /usr/ports/devel/py-rlcompleter2/Makefile devel/py-rlcompleter2/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/devel/py-rlcompleter2/Makefile	2012-11-08 05:16:25.000000000 +0900
+++ devel/py-rlcompleter2/Makefile	2013-05-14 00:00:49.000000000 +0900
@@ -1,15 +1,10 @@
-# ex:ts=8
-# Ports collection makefile for:	py-rlcompleter2
-# Date created:			Dec 31, 2003
-# Whom:				ijliao
-#
+# Created by: ijliao
 # $FreeBSD: head/devel/py-rlcompleter2/Makefile 300896 2012-07-14 13:54:48Z beat $
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	rlcompleter2
-PORTVERSION=	0.96
+PORTVERSION=	0.98
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
-MASTER_SITES=	http://codespeak.net/rlcompleter2/download/
+MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
diff -urN /usr/ports/devel/py-rlcompleter2/distinfo devel/py-rlcompleter2/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/devel/py-rlcompleter2/distinfo	2012-11-08 05:16:25.000000000 +0900
+++ devel/py-rlcompleter2/distinfo	2013-05-14 00:00:49.000000000 +0900
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

-SIZE (rlcompleter2-0.96.tar.gz) = 10964
+SHA256 (rlcompleter2-0.98.tar.gz) = 41d00709f4275af49605461cecb935eac5e1d4a39bf0c34f6e0c5a1e00304617
+SIZE (rlcompleter2-0.98.tar.gz) = 10581
diff -urN /usr/ports/devel/py-rlcompleter2/pkg-descr devel/py-rlcompleter2/pkg-descr
--- /usr/ports/devel/py-rlcompleter2/pkg-descr	2013-03-29 02:20:44.000000000 +0900
+++ devel/py-rlcompleter2/pkg-descr	2013-05-14 00:00:49.000000000 +0900
@@ -4,4 +4,4 @@
     * convenient completions on module, instance and function objects
     * ultra simple user interface: <tab> (try hit it multiple times!)
 
-WWW: http://codespeak.net/rlcompleter2/
+WWW: https://pypi.python.org/pypi/rlcompleter2/
